report.summary: Researched and built two new learn guides: Sui Blockchain Guide and On-Chain Analytics for Crypto Trading, both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Sui blockchain: $600M TVL (peaked $2.6B), 168M active addresses, 54+ DeFi protocols, Move language object-centric model, 297K theoretical TPS, sub-500ms finality
Sui ecosystem: Suilend ($745M peak TVL), NAVI Protocol ($723M peak), Cetus DEX, DeepBook CLOB, USDsui stablecoin launched March 2026
SUI token: $1.06 price, $4.1B market cap, 3.9B/10B circulating, ATH $5.37 (Jan 2025), 42.9M token unlock April 2026
On-chain analytics: MVRV Z-Score at 1.2 (not overheated), SOPR below 1.0 (loss realization), declining exchange reserves — conditions similar to pre-rally Q4 2023
Key tools: Glassnode (7,500+ metrics), Nansen (500M+ labeled addresses), Dune Analytics (100+ chains), Santiment (social + on-chain), CheckOnChain (free BTC charts)
Core framework: MVRV Z-Score + SOPR + Exchange Netflows + ETF Flows as the four pillars of on-chain analysis

sections.title: Content Created
items: Sui Blockchain Guide (~3,000 words, 12 min read) — covers object-centric model, Move language, DeFi ecosystem (Suilend, NAVI, Cetus, DeepBook), tokenomics, Sui vs Solana/Ethereum comparison, risks, 2026 roadmap

On-Chain Analytics for Crypto Trading (~3,500 words, 14 min read) — covers MVRV Z-Score, SOPR (with LTH/STH variants), exchange flows, whale tracking, NUPL, HODL Waves, hash rate, ETF flows, tool comparison, and a 4-layer analysis framework

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: sui-blockchain-guide: Title 'Sui Blockchain Guide (2026) — Move Language, Object Model & DeFi | degen0x' (65 chars), targets 'sui blockchain guide', 'sui move language', 'sui defi'
on-chain-analytics-guide: Title 'On-Chain Analytics for Crypto Trading (2026) — MVRV, SOPR & More | degen0x' (73 chars), targets 'on-chain analytics', 'MVRV Z-Score', 'SOPR crypto'
Both pages include 5 FAQs targeting People Also Ask queries, 5 related article internal links, structured TOC with anchor links
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
